name: AC Ace
description: A British 2-seater sports car manufactured from 1953 to 1963

name: AC Aceca
description: A two-seater coupé based on the AC Ace, produced from 1954 to 1963

name: AC Greyhound
description: A sports car produced between 1959 and 1962

name: AC Cobra
description: A British sports car produced in collaboration with Carroll Shelby from 1962 to 1967

name: AC Shelby Cobra Daytona Coupe
description: A racing version of the AC Cobra, produced from 1964 to 1965

name: AC Frua
description: A 2+2 coupe based on the AC Ace, produced from 1963 to 1965

name: AC 428FG GT
description: A development of the Cobra, produced from 1967 to 1970

name: AC 3000ME
description: A four-seater sports car produced from 1985 to 1993

name: AC Mk VIII
description: A modern handcrafted sports car launched in 2001, still in production
